gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, with tech companies also having career counselors reminding attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; moreover, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, tech companies also have career counselors reminding attendees to maintain eye contact, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; furthermore, students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; also, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; furthermore, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

Throughout the event, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.
Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.
Students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, all while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; furthermore, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; furthermore, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and tech companies also have career counselors reminding attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; furthermore, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, career counselors, including those from tech companies, remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders; finally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
